name: Truffled Chocolate Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 Frozen all-butter pound cake (16 ounces, thawed)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a glass bowl or measuring cup, combine the chocolate chips and whipping cream.
2. Heat in the microwave on high power for 1 to 1-1/2 minutes, or until the chocolate is melted and the mixture is smooth when stirred. Stir in the vanilla.
3. Allow the mixture to cool slightly until it thickens and reaches a spreading consistency (refrigerating may expedite this process).
4. Cut the cake into three layers horizontally or lengthwise. Place the bottom layer on a serving dish.
5. Spread evenly with one-fourth of the chocolate mixture over the bottom layer.
6. Top with the middle cake layer and spread with more chocolate mixture.
7. Add the top cake layer and spread the remaining chocolate mixture over the top and sides of the cake.
8. Refrigerate until the chocolate is firm and set.
9. Cut into slices.
Makes 8 to 10 servings.
